title: satureja makinoi
intro: Satureja makinoi, also known as Makino's savory or Japanese savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satureja makinoi include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and providing relief from digestive issues and respiratory problems. Satureja makinoi can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional Japanese medicine and herbal remedies.
